milestones: solution.py exists and is syntactically valid Python (parses without errors)
A Quiz module/class is implemented containing multiple-choice questions about cultural traditions, customs, or festivals
A Puzzle module/class is implemented with matching or puzzle-solving mechanics involving cultural elements such as landmarks, clothing, or animals
A Recipe module/class is implemented that includes ingredient lists, step-by-step cooking instructions, and cooking tips for traditional dishes
The system is identifiable as Cultural_Journey (via class name, module name, or main entry point)
The system provides interactive user input handling (e.g., answering quiz questions, solving puzzles, or browsing recipes)
